summary: Comprehensive testing of ConstructConnect contractor finder mobile app. All backend APIs (43 tests) and frontend features tested successfully. Real-time WebSocket chat, AI contract generation, and all CRUD operations verified working.

integration_issues.issue: WebView shows 'React Native WebView does not support this platform' error in web preview. This is a platform limitation - WebView requires native mobile environment. Map functionality should work correctly on actual iOS/Android devices or Expo Go app.
integration_issues.note: Not a bug - expected behavior for web preview testing

action_items: Map functionality can only be verified on actual mobile devices or Expo Go app, not web preview
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All backend endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field
✓ Authorization checks working correctly (401 for unauth, 403 for wrong role)
✓ All CRUD operations verified with Create → GET pattern
✓ Password hashes never exposed in API responses
✓ All interactive UI elements have proper testID attributes
✓ Mobile-first design with proper touch targets and spacing
✓ WebSocket connection, authentication, room management, and broadcasting all working
Minor: React Native deprecation warnings for 'shadow*' and 'props.pointerEvents' - non-critical
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Used existing 20 demo contractors + 1 demo client. Created test conversations, reviews, and portfolio items during testing (prefixed with 'TEST_' for identification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully functional. Backend APIs 100% passing. Frontend UI working correctly with real-time chat. Map view limitation is platform-specific (WebView doesn't render in web preview, needs native mobile environment). AI contract generation working with GPT-5.2. Socket.IO WebSocket implementation tested and verified with multiple clients in same room.

home_explore.map_view: ⚠ Platform limitation (WebView not supported in web preview)
home_explore.contractor_cards: ✓ Passed (showing name, type, rating, rate, distance)
